tools.name: get_physical_presence
tools.description: Look up a business's Physical Presence Score (PPS) and first/last observation dates in a city. Returns the best-matching entity, score components, cohort percentile, and coverage confidence.

tools.name: compare_presence
tools.description: Compare the physical presence of multiple businesses in the same city, side by side, ranked by Physical Presence Score.

tools.name: city_index
tools.description: StreetProof PBI rankings for a city, optionally filtered by industry. Rankings are ordered by PPS and must be interpreted with coverage confidence. Aggregate statistics licensed CC BY 4.0 (attribution required).

tools.name: check_business_reality
tools.description: Answer 'has this company ever actually been seen in the physical world?' for a business name in a city. The input field retains its v1 name for compatibility; street-address matching is not supported. Returns a presence evidence summary, coverage-adjusted confidence, and a human-readable citation st

tools.name: get_pulse
tools.description: StreetPulse change events for a city since a date: new public records, newly observed assets, wrapped fleet assets, stale assets, and Digital Gap events. Closure, rebrand, and vacancy events remain explicitly unavailable until reviewed lifecycle evidence exists.
